html:
Ferns are naturally-spawned objects which are similar to Flowers. They grow randomly in Caves and more abundantly in Ruins. Ferns can be picked to obtain 1 Foliage. When eaten, the Foliage restores 1 Health.

Some Ferns become more red in color during the Nightmare Phase of the Ruins.

Withered Fern

Exclusive to:

Withered Ferns can be found in the Fumarole Biome. When picked, each Withered Fern gives a Cut Grass.

Trivia

  • Ferns were added in the It's not a Rock! update.
  • Ferns were originally green.

Gallery

  • Old Fern textures.
  • Ferns changing color during the Nightmare Phase.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

"cave_fern"
“It's a fern.”
–Wilson
“Looks flammable.”
–Willow
“Pretty plant!”
–Wolfgang
“A touch of color in the darkness.”
–Wendy
“YOUR CHARMS WILL NOT WORK ON ME, PLANT.”
–WX-78
“A lovely ornamental plant.”
–Wickerbottom
“Hey! It's a fern!”
–Woodie
“I'd like to step on it.”
–Maxwell
“Rudimentary plant life.”
–Wagstaff
“Föliage fröm the dark ages.”
–Wigfrid
“Swirly plants.”
–Webber
“Nature finds a way, even here.”
–Walani
“How does anything grow down here?”
–Warly
“How did ye grow doon here wit' no light?”
–Woodlegs
“CAN'ST WILBA EAT IT?”
–Wilba
“How you doing?”
–Wormwood
“That says projectile to me.”
–Wheeler
“Take a gander at this tiny fern!”
–Winona
“It prefers the dark.”
–Wortox
“Leafy cave plant.”
–Wurt
“There's some weird plants growing down here.”
–Walter
“How very interesting. Anyway...”
–Wanda
Ferns are naturally-spawned objects which are similar to Flowers. They grow randomly in Caves and more abundantly in Ruins. Ferns can be picked to obtain 1 Foliage. When eaten, the Foliage restores 1 Health.
Some Ferns become more red in color during the Nightmare Phase of the Ruins.

–Wilson

–Willow
“Plant is dead.”
–Wolfgang
“It's dead'.”
–Wendy
“HA”
–WX-78
“It is quite dead.”
–Wickerbottom
“Hey, it's dead!”
–Woodie
“Ah well.”
–Maxwell
“'Tis dead.”
–Wigfrid
“Aww, it's dead.”
–Webber
“It did not survive this environment.”
–Warly
“Dead”
–Wormwood
“Aww, that fern's dead.”
–Winona
“Looks dead, I said.”
–Wortox
“Leafy cave plant dead. Flort.”
–Wurt
“These weird plants don't do well down here.”
–Walter
“Not interesting at all.”
–Wanda
Withered Ferns can be found in the Fumarole Biome. When picked, each Withered Fern gives a Cut Grass.

Ferns were added in the It's not a Rock! update.
Ferns were originally green.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Dương xỉ là những vật thể sinh sản tự nhiên tương tự như Hoa. Chúng phát triển ngẫu nhiên trong Hang động và nhiều hơn trong Tàn tích. Dương xỉ có thể được hái để nhận được 1 Tán lá. Khi ăn, Tán Lá hồi lại 1 Máu.

'''Ferns''' are naturally-spawned objects which are similar to Flowers. They grow randomly in [[Caves]] and more abundantly in [[Ruins]]. Ferns can be picked to obtain 1 [[Foliage]]. When eaten, the Foliage restores 1 Health.

Some Ferns become more red in color during the Nightmare Phase of the Ruins.
{{clear}}
